claims.quote: The Office of Continuing Medical Education offers a range of learning activities for practicing physicians, residents, fellows, medical students and allied health professionals including accredited CME that serves to maintain and develop the knowledge and clinical skills necessary to provide quality and safe care to patients.
claims.claimText: Office of CME offers learning activities for practicing physicians, residents, fellows, medical students and allied health professionals.
claims.limitations: CME serves multiple audiences including attendings (Tier 3) and trainees (Tier 2); not USCE.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: CME for practicing physicians places this primarily in Tier 3 post-trainee continuing education.
claims.visibilityRationale: lane is future-lane only

claims.quote: Continuing Medical Education (CME)
claims.claimText: Hub page lists Continuing Medical Education (CME) as an opportunity (Tier 3 attending-stage education).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: CME is post-licensure continuing education for practicing physicians — Tier 3.
claims.visibilityRationale: lane is future-lane only

claims.quote: The Office of Human Research is dedicated to providing physicians with the necessary tools, resources and training to make it easy to participate in the research enterprise, including the ability to conduct their own research studies.
claims.claimText: Office of Human Research supports physicians in conducting research; audience stated as 'physicians' (not students).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Research office explicitly targets physicians (already-practicing), not medical students — Tier 3 by stated audience.
claims.limitations: No medical-student access stated on this page; cannot be treated as a Tier 1 research elective signal.
claims.visibilityRationale: lane is future-lane only
